title: grammitis kessleri
intro: Grammitis kessleri, also known as the Kessler's Grammitis or Kessler's Rockcap Fern, is a species of epiphytic fern in the family Polypodiaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Grammitis kessleri include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Grammitis kessleri typically involve drying and powdering the leaves, which can then be used in teas, tinctures, or infusions.
